items.claim: Gable Steveson is one of the best wrestlers to enter the heavyweight division in the last five years.
items.quote: you're going to fight maybe the best wrestler we've ever seen in the heavyweight division in the last five years.

items.claim: Gable Steveson will struggle against top-six heavyweight competition.
items.quote: He's not going to have trouble until he gets into that top six... That's when he's going to start to have problems.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's chin is not durable at 185 pounds.
items.quote: Your chin's already not that good at 85

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is not a one-punch knockout fighter.
items.quote: Whittaker, you know, Whittaker doesn't have the most power at this point of his career. Rob's never have a one-punch knockout guy.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is a more technical striker than Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: is he a better technical striker than Nikita Krylov? Yes.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov is a primary wrestler who has shifted his focus to boxing.
items.quote: Nikita Krylov is a primary wrestler. Can he take down Whittaker? I don't know. And Krylov, by the way, hasn't wrestled a lot recently, but that's how he came up, right? We knew Krylov, you know, rising up the ranks as a primary wrestler who has fallen in love more with boxing.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has not reached the second round in any fight since July 2023.
items.quote: He has not seen a second round since July of 2023
